overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Elden Ring showing a character in a fur cloak walking through a snowy mountainous wasteland toward a massive burning Erdtree. The scene features ancient stone ruins and pillars scattered across the landscape under an apocalyptic red sky filled with falling embers.

scene_state.functional_zone: snowy mountain valley with ancient ruins in distance

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the snowy valley toward the distant stone pillars under the burning sky

entered.detail: snow-covered ground with patches of dead grass and scattered debris
tall ornate stone pillars rising in the distance
large dark rock formations covered in snow
large dark rock formations with glowing red embers
massive burning tree dominating the sky with falling embers and red-orange glow

segments.scene_description: The character walks through a wide snowy valley with ancient stone pillars visible in the far distance. The sky is dominated by the massive burning Erdtree casting an ominous red glow over the snow-covered terrain.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky ascent with ancient stone steps and ruins

events.description: begins ascending snow-covered stone ruins and steps between large rock formations

agents.ego_description: climbing up ancient stone steps and navigating through narrow passages between large rock outcrops

entered.detail: ancient broken stone steps and platforms covered in snow
massive boulders with glowing red cracks
towering rock walls with snow accumulation

segments.scene_description: The character ascends through ancient stone ruins, climbing snow-covered steps between massive rock formations. The stone pillars grow larger in the frame as the character approaches.

scene_state.functional_zone: open approach to the burning erdtree with scattered ruins

events.description: exits narrow rocky passage into open area with massive burning tree dominating the sky ahead

agents.ego_description: walking across open snowfield toward the massive burning Erdtree, passing between ancient pillars

entered.detail: massive fallen stone statue partially buried in snow
broken stone archway framing the path forward

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the narrow passage, the scene opens into a wide area with the massive burning Erdtree now prominently visible ahead. The character walks between ancient stone pillars toward the tree, passing fallen statues and ruined archways.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone gate entrance beneath the burning erdtree

events.description: approaching the massive stone gate with the burning tree filling the sky directly overhead

agents.ego_description: approaching the ancient stone gate entrance leading toward the base of the massive burning Erdtree

entered.detail: massive ancient stone gate with ornate carvings framing the entrance
giant roots of the burning tree visible at the base of the structure

segments.scene_description: The character approaches the final stone gate entrance with the massive burning Erdtree now filling the sky directly overhead. The ancient gate frames the path forward as the character moves toward the base of the burning tree structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous journey through a frozen wasteland that gradually narrows into ancient ruins before opening up toward a colossal burning tree. It begins with a character traversing a wide snowy valley under an ominous red sky, with distant stone pillars marking the path. As the character ascends, the terrain shifts into a climb through snow-covered steps and massive rock formations, causing the stone pillars to loom larger in the frame. The scene then expands as the character emerges from a narrow passage into a wide plaza of fallen statues and ruined archways, bringing the massive burning Erdtree into prominent view. Finally, the camera moves through a towering stone gate that frames the path forward, with the glowing structure of the tree now filling the sky directly overhead.
